protected_files.reason: This file contains the workspace-wide Copilot instruction set. Deleting it removes all agent guidance.
protected_files.next: Edit the file content instead of deleting it, or delete it manually in your terminal if you are certain.

dangerous_terminal.reason: Recursive force-delete is irreversible and may remove files outside the intended scope.
dangerous_terminal.next: Run the command manually in your terminal after confirming the target path is correct.

dangerous_terminal.reason: Force-push rewrites remote history and cannot be undone by other collaborators.
dangerous_terminal.next: Use 'git push --force-with-lease' for a safer alternative, or run manually if you are certain.

dangerous_terminal.reason: Pushing directly to main bypasses the PR review workflow required by this project.
dangerous_terminal.next: Create a feature branch, commit your changes there, and open a PR instead of pushing directly to main.

dangerous_terminal.reason: This SQL statement permanently deletes a database table and all its data.

credential_access.reason: This file may contain credentials, API keys, or secrets.
credential_access.next: Use environment variable injection or a secrets manager instead of reading this file directly.

credential_access.reason: Operations on files or paths named 'secrets' may expose sensitive credentials.
credential_access.next: Use a secrets manager or environment variable injection to access credentials safely.

credential_access.reason: Operations involving 'token' in the path or command may expose authentication credentials.
credential_access.next: Use a secrets manager or environment variable injection to access tokens safely.

credential_access.reason: Operations involving 'password' in the path or command may expose sensitive credentials.

blocked_mcp_tools.reason: MCP git tools bypass the pre-tool-use security gate. Terminal git must be used so push-to-main and other dangerous-command guards can intercept.
blocked_mcp_tools.next: Use terminal git instead: 'git add <files>' and 'git commit -m <message>', on a feature branch (not main).

blocked_mcp_tools.reason: MCP git push bypasses the pre-tool-use security gate. Terminal git must be used so push-to-main guards can intercept.
blocked_mcp_tools.next: Use terminal 'git push' instead, after verifying you are on a feature branch and not main.
